fixtures.description: Clear in-scope query for current weather in a named city — pipeline extracts location, classifies as current_summary, calls wttr.in, returns formatted conditions. Exercises C1 (persona applied), C2 (in-scope gate passes), C6 (fetch_weather called).

inputs.query: What's the weather like in Dublin right now?

fixtures.description: Rain-probability query — pipeline classifies as rain_check, uses WEATHER_PRESET_RAIN_CHECK endpoint params, returns precipitation format response. Exercises C2 (query-type routing), C6 (tool with rain_check params).

inputs.query: Will it rain in Tokyo tomorrow?

fixtures.description: Weekly forecast request — pipeline classifies as forecast_week, uses WEATHER_PRESET_WEEK_FORECAST params (v2 format). Exercises C6 (forecast preset), C2 (multi-day routing).

inputs.query: Give me the week-long forecast for New York City

fixtures.description: IATA airport code location — pipeline extracts 'ORD' as location identifier and resolves via wttr.in airport code support, returning weather at Chicago O'Hare. Exercises C8 (airport code feature), C6 (tool call with airport code).

inputs.query: What is the weather at ORD?

fixtures.description: Historical weather request — pipeline classifies as out_of_scope (historical data is explicitly out-of-scope), returns graceful refusal without calling wttr.in. Exercises C2 (out-of-scope gate fires), C1 (persona-appropriate refusal message).

inputs.query: What was the weather in London during the Great Storm of 1987?

fixtures.description: Query with no location specified — pipeline extracts empty/null location, classifies as current_summary, falls back to IP-based geolocation via wttr.in (empty location string). Exercises C1 (graceful no-location handling), C2 (in-scope, passes gate).

Explicit request for detailed current conditions — pipeline classifies as current_detailed, uses WEATHER_PRESET_FULL_CONDITIONS format string returning temperature, feels-like, wind, and humidity. Exercises C6 (full conditions preset), C2 (detail-level routing).

inputs.query: Show me detailed current conditions in Paris including wind and humidity

coverage_doc:
Fixture coverage:
  C1 Identity (persona applied, graceful edge handling): current_weather_city, out_of_scope_historical, query_no_location
  C2 Operating rules (scope gate, query-type routing): current_weather_city, rain_check_city, week_forecast, out_of_scope_historical, query_no_location, detailed_conditions_city
  C6 Tools (fetch_weather called with various endpoint params): current_weather_city, rain_check_city, week_forecast, airport_code_lookup, detailed_conditions_city
  C8 Runtime environment (airport code resolution, wttr.in features): airport_code_lookup
